page.title: Prompt Registry
page.subtitle: Manage all prompt fragments: built-in, plugin-injected, and user-defined entries. The 7 stages (System Base -> Refinement) strictly control the final System Prompt order sent to the LLM.

editor.name: Display Name
editor.categoryHint: Determines the physical position of this prompt in the final System Prompt
editor.priorityHint: Sort weight within the same stage, higher values appear first (0-100)
editor.sourceHint: Identifies the origin of this entry (system / user / plugin:xxx)
editor.contentFunctionalHint: This content is dynamically generated by code and cannot be edited
editor.systemWarning: This entry is from the system or legacy interceptor. Modifying it may affect core behavior. Proceed with caution.

legacy.alertMessage: The system intercepted forced prompt injections from legacy plugins and archived them as Legacy Prompts. You can disable or modify them in the list below.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete prompt "{id}"? This action cannot be undone.

overview.legacyNote: Entries archived from legacy plugin interception
